name: Neon Grid Agency
tagline: Cyber agency template with black surfaces, neon frames, geometric signage, bright palette chips, and model-agency energy.

palette.description: black cyber grid with cyan, magenta, yellow, orange, and violet neon accents

best_for: Creative agency pitches, model/talent decks, neon campaign concepts, and youth-focused brand presentations.
